expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses so users can track whether work is pending, in progress, or done.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema/migration",
      "description": "As a system, I want to store a status value for each task so that existing tasks default to pending.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["schema.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a system, I want to update the status of a task so that users can save their progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create backend API or action to update task status",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["server/actions.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see the current status as a badge on task cards so that I know the state of the task.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display status badges",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["components/TaskCard.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task's status from the task list so that I can easily update task progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task rows have a dropdown or buttons to change status",
        "Changing status saves immediately via backend action",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["components/TaskRow.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on specific tasks.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list has a filter control for status",
        "Selecting a status updates the list of tasks",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["components/TaskList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
